texto: Kevin Hart. He's the man! I like his style. He's short, so I can relate. All the stories he tells are real. I respect that, and he's just a really funny dude - great comedy instincts. To do stand-up on a stage for an hour and tell stories and make people laugh is incredible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cameron Boyce: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Kevin Hart. He's the man! I like his style. He's short, so I can relate. All the stories he tells…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, funny, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de great e man.
